tree.setup: You're interviewing for a position at a Chinese company. The interviewer asks about your background and strengths.
tree.setup_zh: 你正在一家中国公司面试。面试官问你的背景和优点。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你好，欢迎来面试。请先简单介绍一下你自己，包括你的工作经验。
turns.text_pinyin: nǐ hǎo, huānyíng lái miànshì. qǐng xiān jiǎndān jièshào yīxià nǐ zìjǐ, bāokuò nǐ de gōngzuò jīngyàn.
turns.text_en: Hello, welcome to the interview. Please briefly introduce yourself, including your work experience.

options.text_zh: 您好，谢谢给我这次面试的机会。我有三年的工作经验，我的简历上写得比较详细。我觉得我的能力很适合这个职位。
options.text_pinyin: nín hǎo, xièxie gěi wǒ zhè cì miànshì de jīhuì. wǒ yǒu sān nián de gōngzuò jīngyàn, wǒ de jiǎnlì shàng xiě de bǐjiào xiángxì. wǒ juéde wǒ de nénglì hěn shìhé zhège zhíwèi.
options.text_en: Hello, thank you for giving me this interview opportunity. I have three years of work experience, which is described in detail on my resume. I believe my abilities are well suited to this position.
options.feedback: Excellent — polite opening with 您好, expresses gratitude, references 简历 and 经验, and uses 适合 appropriately.

options.text_zh: 我觉得可以去云南。那边风景特别美，而且吃住都不算太贵。我们可以先去大理，然后再去丽江。你觉得怎么样？
options.text_pinyin: wǒ juéde kěyǐ qù yúnnán. nà biān fēngjǐng tèbié měi, érqiě chī zhù dōu bú suàn tài guì. wǒmen kěyǐ xiān qù dàlǐ, ránhòu zài qù lìjiāng. nǐ juéde zěnmeyàng?
options.text_en: I think we could go to Yunnan. The scenery is especially beautiful, and food and lodging aren't too expensive. We could go to Dali first, then Lijiang. What do you think?
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to introduce yourself and your experience, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

options.text_zh: 我觉得每人预算五千左右比较合理。为了省钱，我们可以坐火车去，虽然时间长一点，但能省不少机票钱。至于人多的问题，我们可以避开最热门的景点，去一些小众的地方。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ juéde měi rén yùsuàn wǔ qiān zuǒyòu bǐjiào hélǐ. wèile shěng qián, wǒmen kěyǐ zuò huǒchē qù, suīrán shíjiān cháng yīdiǎn, dàn néng shěng bùshǎo jīpiào qián. zhìyú rén duō de wèntí, wǒmen kěyǐ bìkāi zuì rèmén de jǐngdiǎn, qù yīxiē xiǎozhòng de dìfāng.
options.text_en: I think a budget of about 5,000 per person is reasonable. To save money, we could take the train -- it takes longer, but we'd save a lot on airfare. As for the crowds, we can avoid the most popular attractions and visit some lesser-known places.
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to introduce yourself and your experience, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好的。你觉得你最大的优点和缺点分别是什么？
turns.text_pinyin: hǎo de. nǐ juéde nǐ zuì dà de yōudiǎn hé quēdiǎn fēnbié shì shénme?
turns.text_en: Okay. What do you think are your greatest strengths and weaknesses?

options.text_zh: 谢谢王老师，我会按照您说的方法去做。从这周开始，我每周写一篇短文，先自己检查，再给您看。如果遇到不明白的语法问题，可以发邮件问您吗？
options.text_pinyin: xièxie wáng lǎoshī, wǒ huì ànzhào nín shuō de fāngfǎ qù zuò. cóng zhè zhōu kāishǐ, wǒ měi zhōu xiě yī piān duǎnwén, xiān zìjǐ jiǎnchá, zài gěi nín kàn. rúguǒ yù dào bù míngbai de yǔfǎ wèntí, kěyǐ fā yóujiàn wèn nín ma?
options.text_en: Thank you Teacher Wang. I'll follow the methods you suggested. Starting this week, I'll write one short piece per week, check it myself first, then show you. If I run into grammar questions I don't understand, may I email you?
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to describe your strengths and weaknesses, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

options.text_zh: 我的优点是做事认真负责，善于和同事合作。我的缺点是有时候太注重细节，但我一直在努力改进。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ de yōudiǎn shì zuòshì rènzhēn fùzé, shànyú hé tóngshì hézuò. wǒ de quēdiǎn shì yǒu shíhou tài zhùzhòng xìjié, dàn wǒ yīzhí zài nǔlì gǎijìn.
options.text_en: My strength is being conscientious and responsible, and good at collaborating with colleagues. My weakness is sometimes paying too much attention to details, but I've been working to improve.
options.feedback: Well-balanced answer — frames 缺点 modestly and shows self-awareness. This matches the humble tone expected in Chinese interviews.

options.text_zh: 王老师，是的。这次期中考试我只考了六十八分，比我预期的低很多。我考试之前复习了，但结果还是不理想。我想请教一下，您觉得我主要是哪方面的问题？
options.text_pinyin: wáng lǎoshī, shì de. zhè cì qīzhōng kǎoshì wǒ zhǐ kǎo le liùshíbā fēn, bǐ wǒ yùqī de dī hěn duō. wǒ kǎoshì zhīqián fùxí le, dàn jiéguǒ háishi bù lǐxiǎng. wǒ xiǎng qǐngjiào yīxià, nín juéde wǒ zhǔyào shì nǎ fāngmiàn de wèntí?
options.text_en: Teacher Wang, yes. I only scored 68 on this midterm, much lower than I expected. I reviewed before the exam, but the results were still not ideal. I'd like to ask your advice -- what do you think my main issues are?
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to describe your strengths and weaknesses, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

tree.cultural_note: In Chinese job interviews, humility (谦虚) is highly valued. Overstating your abilities can backfire — interviewers expect candidates to acknowledge weaknesses honestly while framing them constructively.
